business_problem: GCash, the Philippines' largest super-app used by 8 in 10 Filipinos and partnering with 6M+ social sellers and merchants, faced limited scalability on its legacy on-premises platform, insufficient operational flexibility for 24x7 services, and a lack of real-time analytics to handle growing data volumes and drive personalized fintech experiences.
solution_summary: GCash, the Philippines' #1 fintech super app serving 80% of Filipinos and 6 million merchants, ingests transaction data from mobile wallets, digital payments, and merchant platforms into a scalable cloud architecture supporting mission-critical financial operations. The platform combines transactional processing via ECS and RDS for high-concurrency payment clearing, with big data analytics through MaxCompute and real-time intelligence via Hologres enabling fraud detection and personalized financial recommendations. ZOLOZ Real ID ensures trusted user onboarding, while comprehensive security services (WAF, Anti-DDoS, Log Service) protect against threats, and Machine Learning Platform powers risk modeling and financial inclusion analytics at 24x7 availability.
business_outcome: GCash built a scalable, secure, data-driven fintech platform serving 8 in 10 Filipinos, with high-concurrency OLTP, real-time analytics, AI-driven risk modeling and fraud detection, and platform stability backed by Alibaba Cloud's well-architected framework.
metrics: 6 million+ social sellers and merchants partnered
architecture_clues: ApsaraDB RDS for high-concurrency OLTP and low-latency caching
MaxCompute + DataWorks for large-scale batch processing and orchestration
PAI for risk modeling, fraud detection, and user insights
ZOLOZ Real ID for digital identity onboarding
WAF, Anti-DDoS, Log Service (SLS) for security and observability
evidence_quotes: GCash partnered with Alibaba Cloud to overcome those challenges. It adopted a mix of solutions including IaaS, the MaxCompute data warehousing platform, the Elastic MapReduce big data platform and a Web Application Firewall.
8 in 10 Filipinos use GCash, and the platform partners with more than 6 million social sellers and merchants nationwide.
Along with the Machine Learning Platform for AI (PAI), it supports risk modeling, fraud detection, and user insights at scale by building and deploying AI models within GCash.

solution_components.name: Elastic Compute Service
solution_components.role: Foundational virtual infrastructure handling transaction processing and application services

solution_components.name: ApsaraDB RDS
solution_components.role: High-concurrency relational database for transactional payment processing and financial records

solution_components.name: Object Storage Service
solution_components.role: Secure storage for transactional records, audit logs, and analytical datasets

solution_components.name: MaxCompute
solution_components.role: Large-scale batch processing for historical financial analytics and risk pattern detection

solution_components.name: DataWorks
solution_components.role: Unified data integration and ETL orchestration for GCash's financial data pipelines

solution_components.name: Hologres
solution_components.role: Real-time interactive analytics engine for instant fraud detection and transaction insights

solution_components.name: Machine Learning Platform for AI
solution_components.role: ML models for fraud detection, risk modeling, and user financial profiling

solution_components.name: Elastic MapReduce
solution_components.role: Distributed processing for large-scale financial data analysis and pattern mining

solution_components.name: ZOLOZ Real ID
solution_components.role: Digital identity verification enabling remote user onboarding and KYC compliance

solution_components.name: Web Application Firewall
solution_components.role: HTTP-layer security protecting payment application endpoints from web attacks

solution_components.name: Anti-DDoS
solution_components.role: Network-layer DDoS protection ensuring payment system availability during attacks

solution_components.name: Log Service
solution_components.role: Centralized logging and security event audit trail for regulatory compliance

data_flow: Mobile transactions/merchant activity → ECS payment processing → RDS/caching layer → MaxCompute batch analytics → Hologres real-time insights → recommendations/fraud alerts
integration_points: Financial inclusion initiatives across underserved populations
